overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic dystopian city environment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a walk along elevated walkways past destroyed buildings, palm trees, and neon-lit structures under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with rubble and overgrown vegetation

events.description: spiky-haired character passes by closely on the left side of the frame
moving from shaded area under structure into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pathway, navigating around debris and rubble piles

notable_agents.action: character with spiky blonde hair and green pants standing near the path edge at the start

entered.detail: large fallen palm tree trunk lying across the walkway with exposed roots
tall futuristic skyscraper with distinctive vertical gold stripes and dark facade
piles of concrete debris and destruction along the walkway edge
concrete pedestrian walkway with teal railings elevated above street level
large rectangular concrete planters with palm trees and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway in a futuristic city, passing a character with spiky hair and navigating around fallen palm trunks and rubble piles. The massive gold-striped megabuilding looms on the right while palm trees line the left side under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated plaza with view of distant dome structure

events.description: emerging from rubble-strewn section into cleaner open plaza area with wider visibility
approaching and passing a standing NPC in the middle of the pathway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway toward an open area with a distinctive spherical building visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: person standing still in the middle of the walkway ahead, blocking the path slightly

entered.detail: large spherical building with lattice structure visible in the distance against the sky
bright green spray-painted text and symbols on the concrete walkway surface
building with bright pink neon signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open plaza section of the elevated walkway with clear views of a distinctive spherical dome building in the distance. Passing a standing NPC and walking over green graffiti painted on the concrete surface while palm trees in large planters line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with view of street level below

events.description: turning right to face the railing and look down at street level below
shifting view from walkway to overlooking the street and neon-lit buildings below

agents.ego_description: stopping to look over the railing at the street level below, observing the neon-lit buildings and distant smoke

entered.detail: view down to the street level with abandoned vehicles, debris, and destroyed infrastructure
dark smoke rising from fires in the distant dystopian cityscape
teal metal railing marking the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Turning to overlook the edge of the elevated walkway, revealing a view of the street level below with a prominent neon-lit building displaying 'Brain of St...' signage. Dark smoke rises from distant fires in the dystopian cityscape while construction cranes are visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with security structures and descending ramp

events.description: turning back from the overlook to continue along the walkway
approaching and beginning to descend a ramp leading downward to lower levels

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past guard towers and scaffolding, then descending a ramp toward lower levels

entered.detail: wooden and metal scaffolding structures with roofs resembling guard posts or watchtowers
concrete ramp with teal railings leading downward to lower elevation
industrial scaffolding and construction materials along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the overlook and continuing along the elevated walkway past makeshift guard towers and industrial scaffolding. The path leads to a descending ramp with teal railings, moving deeper into the structure alongside the massive gold-striped megabuilding.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along an elevated concrete walkway that transitions from a debris-strewn path into an open plaza before descending deeper into a dystopian urban canyon. It begins by navigating around fallen palm trunks and rubble beside a massive gold-striped megabuilding under the bright midday sun. As the path opens into a plaza, the camera glides over green graffiti and past palm planters, revealing a distinctive spherical dome building in the distance. The perspective then shifts toward the edge of the walkway to overlook the street level below, where neon signage and dark smoke from distant fires contrast against a blue sky filled with construction cranes. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista to pass makeshift guard towers and industrial scaffolding before following a descending ramp with teal railings back toward the looming gold-striped structure.
